title: Folders are great but need ability to sort alphabetically
excerpt:

posts.author: Black_Border (Em Dee)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am using the Portfolio function (which is life changing btw) and I have created three folders to organise the project boards created from the portfolio based on their status (Active, Potential, and Completed)

image1178×737 94.9 KB

I have about 50 projects in my Active folder and I want to be able to sort them out alphabetically to easily find specific projects based on name.

image993×1517 250 KB

I think this is a quick win / low hanging fruit. C’mon team, please make our lives easier.

Ta!

posts.author: WorkWizard (Jon)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would also like to see this feature added. It looks like it existed previously, but has since been removed?
